data.description:

  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

PAX Global Technology ( (HK:0327) ) has shared an update.

PAX Global Technology Limited announced significant leadership changes effective December 12, 2025. Mr. Nie Guoming has stepped down from his roles as Chairman, executive Director, and CEO, with Mr. Xu Changjun appointed as the new Chairman and executive Director. Mr. Luo Shaowen has been named the new CEO and executive Director, while Mr. Cheung Shi Yeung has resigned as an executive Director but will continue as CFO and joint company secretary. These changes reflect a strategic realignment within the company, potentially impacting its market positioning and operational dynamics.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0327) stock is a Hold with a HK$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on PAX Global Technology stock, see the HK:0327 Stock Forecast page.

PAX Global Technology Limited is a company incorporated in Bermuda, operating within the technology sector. It focuses on providing innovative payment solutions and services, primarily targeting markets in Hong Kong and the People’s Republic of China.

data.title: PAX Global Technology Enhances Compliance Following Connected Transaction Discovery
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium and Invest with Confidence

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools designed to help you make smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

PAX Global Technology ( (HK:0327) ) has issued an update.

PAX Global Technology Limited announced the completion of an acquisition involving the purchase of 100% ownership of a Target Company, which was later identified as a connected transaction due to its association with Vendor A, a connected person of the company. The company has since received a refund of 90% of the acquisition consideration and has terminated the service contract with a related director. In response to this incident, PAX Global Technology has enhanced its internal procedures to ensure better regulatory compliance and conflict of interest management.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0327) stock is a Hold with a HK$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on PAX Global Technology stock, see the HK:0327 Stock Forecast page.

More about PAX Global Technology

PAX Global Technology Limited is an investment holding company primarily engaged in the development and sales of electronic funds transfer point-of-sale products, known as E-payment Terminal Products. The company provides maintenance, installation, and payment solution services, distributing its products worldwide in over 100 countries mainly through distributors.

data.description:

  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

Wai Chun Bio-Technology Ltd. ( (HK:0660) ) has issued an announcement.

Wai Chun Bio-Technology Ltd. announced that its subsidiary, Century-Light, entered into a Loan Agreement with a borrower, resulting in multiple unsecured, interest-bearing drawdowns. These drawdowns, which were fully settled by May 2025, led to major and disclosable transactions under Hong Kong’s Listing Rules due to their significant percentage ratios. The company breached certain listing rules by not announcing the drawdowns timely, but received written approval from a major shareholder, negating the need for a general meeting. A circular detailing the drawdowns will be dispatched to shareholders by January 2026.

More about Wai Chun Bio-Technology Ltd.

Wai Chun Bio-Technology Ltd. operates in the biotechnology industry, focusing on providing innovative solutions and services. The company is involved in various financial transactions and investments, aiming to strengthen its market position and expand its operational capabilities.

An announcement from Seres Group Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:9927) ) is now available.

Seres Group Co., Ltd. has announced the renewal of its Continuing Connected Transactions for 2026 with Dongfeng Motor Group, Ruichi Group, and Sokon Holding Group. These agreements, effective from January 1, 2026, to December 31, 2026, involve the procurement and sales of products and services. The transactions exceed a 0.1% but are below a 5% applicable percentage ratio under Hong Kong Listing Rules, requiring annual reporting and review but exempting independent shareholder approval. This renewal ensures the continuation of strategic partnerships and operational stability for Seres Group.
